title: The E-Waste Lifecycle and Environmental Impact
description: A flowchart illustrating the journey of electronic waste from creation to disposal and its pathways for environmental pollution.
relationships: Device is discarded after useful life becoming E-Waste
E-Waste is either properly collected or informally handled
Informal processing (burning, acid baths) releases toxins
Toxins from landfilling and incineration leach into soil and water
Air pollution results from incineration and informal burning
Contaminated soil and water lead to ecosystem and human health damage
